title: The ability to have the same colours repeated but with different text in them for the status columns
excerpt:

posts.author: Tory (Tory Kay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When creating a dashboard for a construction company the contractors vary from project to project. For instance we may have three different companies that do our roofing - it would be so great if we could have the cell display WHO is assigned AND a red, orange or green status. If I can glance at it and see either “Tom, Dick or Harry” and the name is either green, orange or red then that would tell me at a glance who (what company) is doing it and where we are at with the project.

What are you trying to achieve

A one board high level dashboard displayed on a huge monitor that shows at a glance who is doing what across over 40 live building projects and the progress status of each stage
